cases.input: Design search_code, read_file, and edit_file descriptions as routing contracts with reciprocal boundaries and a Grep then Read then Edit repo strategy.
Two tools named analyze and process both claim to handle files; redesign them so a planner never confuses which to call.
My edit_file tool fails intermittently because old_string matches three places in the file; document the failure mode and the fallback.
The agent globs every path and reads the entire repo into context before deciding where to edit, and reasoning degrades.
Someone wrote a tool description that just says Analyzes content with no input format or boundary; decide whether to accept it.
search_code says use read_file to read a file, but read_file never mentions search_code; fix the boundary.
Five tools all overlap on locate, fetch, and mutate; pairwise prose is not scaling, redefine the responsibility axis.
Redacta un correo de seguimiento al cliente sobre el cronograma del proyecto.
Run date in the terminal and tell me the current time.
Verify a finished routing-contract report sets offline, network_required, and deterministic flags before it is allowed to close.
